response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to developer tooling and open-source projects, but lacks clear, recent, and deep involvement with Java/Kotlin, Spring, JVM tooling, or IDE internals — the core requirements of the role. His Java exposure is minimal and outdated, with no evidence of enterprise framework or IDE subsystem ownership.
strengths: Strong track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated ability to work across stacks and pick appropriate technologies for complex systems
Active in teaching and sharing technical knowledge (workshops, talks, CI/CD infrastructure)
concerns: No recent or substantial Java/Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience shown in recent roles
Lack of evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM runtime optimization work
Primary tech stack in last 5 years is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM-based enterprise tooling
